top.name: Temporal Cascade
top.rules_text: Resolve the top 2 items on the stack simultaneously instead of one at a time. (Both resolve before any reactions.)

bottom.name: Retrocausality
bottom.rules_text: Deal 7 damage. This damage is dealt retroactively: it counts as having happened last turn for effects that check history.

channel.name: Retrocausality (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also applied to start-of-turn checks
